title: Oly's Cobblemon Academy 2.0
description: Oly's Cobblemon Academy 2.0, a custom version of Cobblemon Academy 2.0
body:
**NOTE: This is not the official Cobblemon Academy 2.0 modpack, this is a custom version for Oly's Minecraft server.**

Your tenure at the Cobblemon Academy continues with 2.0! This edition has been reshaped to prepare you for your enrollment at our official public Academy!

A familiar world, now with more faces to explore and battle with (or against...)!

Cobblemon Academy expands on the Cobblemon mod with love and ambition. From a world with beautiful new biomes, hundreds of structures to explore and an easy to grasp economy, there's plenty to keep you busy during your time here.
